title: Rach Gia, Kien Giang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rach Gia, Kien Giang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rach Gia is a city in Kien Giang with a population of 250,000. A Mekong Delta port city and gateway to Phu Quoc Island, offering an extremely low cost of living and an authentic glimpse into delta life.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
